title: CLAUDE.md 'per-crate test loop' silently swallows failures
description: The 'cargo test -p "$crate" 2>&1 | tail -1' pipe loses the exit code — the shell sees only tail's exit code (always 0). A crate with failing tests prints FAILED but the loop continues and the gate does not fail. Should pipe to tee or use process substitution so the loop exits non-zero on test failure.
